info.name: Healthcare Appointment System
info.description:
Full API test collection for the Smart Healthcare Appointment System.

Test order:
0. Reset Database
1. Auth (login/register)
2. Doctor Management
3. Patient Management
4. Doctor Availability
5. Appointments
6. Prescriptions
7. Medical Records
8. Security (unauthorized access)

exec: body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ username: 'admin', password: 'admin123' }) }

item.name: 5. Appointments
item.description: Book, cancel, complete appointments + double booking test

item.name: 6. Prescriptions (MongoDB)
item.description: Doctor creates prescriptions, patient views them

item.name: 7. Medical Records (MongoDB)

body.raw:
{
    "patientId": {{patientId}},
    "recordDate": "2026-02-18",
    "title": "Cardiology Consultation",
    "description": "Patient presented with chest pain. ECG normal.",
    "prescriptionIds": ["{{prescriptionId}}"],
    "labReports": ["ECG Report - Normal", "Blood Test - Normal"]
}

item.description: Doctor creates medical records, patient views them
